title: LATERAL crash /.../rel_bin.c:1473: rel2bin_table: Assertion `0' failed.
poc: create table segments (meter int, distance int, speed int);
SELECT t.meter, s.distance, s.speed FROM segments AS s, LATERAL generate_series(s.meter, s.meter+s.distance+1) AS t(meter);
SELECT * FROM segments AS s, LATERAL generate_series(s.meter, s.meter+s.distance+1);
SELECT t.*, s.distance, s.speed FROM segments AS s, LATERAL generate_series(s.meter, s.meter+s.distance+1) AS t(meter);
key_bug_features: Using LATERAL with generate_series on segments table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE segments (meter INT NOT NULL, distance INT CHECK (distance >= 0), speed FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT t.meter, s.distance, s.speed FROM segments AS s, LATERAL generate_series(COALESCE(s.meter, 0), COALESCE(s.meter, 0) + s.distance + 1) AS t(meter);
SELECT t.*, s.distance, s.speed FROM segments AS s, LATERAL generate_series(s.meter, s.meter + s.distance + 1) AS t(meter) WHERE s.speed IS NOT NULL;
